name: R.B. Stage Landing
desc: Special Summon 1 "R.B." monster from your Deck/Extra Deck with a different name than the cards you control. If an "R.B." monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead. You cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this card, except Machine monsters with 1500 or less original ATK.
eff: Special Summon 1 "R.B." monster from your Deck/Extra Deck with a different name than the cards you control. If an "R.B." monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead. You cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this card, except Machine monsters with 1500 or less original ATK.

mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to ATK specific monsters
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
